message:
Low Stock Alert

The following materials are running low on stock:

Material: {{ doc.material_name }}

Category: {{ doc.material_category }}

Grade: {{ doc.material_grade }}

Current Stock: {{ doc.current_stock }}

Reorder Level: {{ doc.reorder_level }}

Please arrange for restocking at the earliest.
name: Low Stock Alert

recipients.condition: doc.current_stock <= doc.reorder_level if doc.reorder_level else doc.current_stock <= 10

subject: Low Stock Alert: {{ doc.material_name }}
